[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up selfie-style image shows a bearded man covering part of his face with one hand while standing in front of a background with visible text.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a man with short dark hair and a full dark beard, wearing dark clothing and a dark strap or collar visible near his neck. His eyes are partially closed or looking downward, and his mouth is closed. One hand is raised toward his mouth and nose area, partially covering his face.

Setting:
The background appears to be indoors or in a studio-like setting with a light-colored backdrop. A large block of text and other graphics are visible behind him, including a white area with dark letters.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and even, giving the image a low-resolution, grainy look. The man’s skin tone and facial features are clearly visible in the center-right of the frame, with his head tilted slightly. Foreground text overlays the image in large, bold, white letters with a black outline, placed across the lower portion of the frame. On the left side of the background, a segment of text reads “GWE” followed by additional small characters that are unclear.

Visible Text:
GWE 08
dupakingjinos

Practical Summary:
The image shows a bearded man in close-up with one hand covering part of his mouth. Large overlaid text appears across the bottom, and additional partial text is visible on the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

GWE 03  
d u p a k l i n g i n g j o s

# Structured Version

- **Text (top-left):** `GWE 03`
- **Text (bottom):** `dupaklinging jos`  

# Notes

- The bottom text appears heavily stylized and may be misspelled/garbled due to image compression. I transcribed it as closely as possible: `dupaklinging jos`.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
